code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    print("none")
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut in_num = false
    mut sign = 1
    mut value = 0
    mut has_pos = false
    mut max_pos = 0
    while i <= n
      mut b = 0
      if i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(x)
          b = x
        when None
          b = 32
        end
      else
        b = 32
      end
      let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
      let is_minus = b == 45
      let is_plus = b == 43
      if is_digit
        if not in_num
          in_num = true
          sign = 1
          value = 0
        end
        value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
      else if is_minus and not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = -1
        value = 0
      else if is_plus and not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        value = 0
      else
        if in_num
          let final_val = sign * value
          if final_val > 0
            if not has_pos
              has_pos = true
              max_pos = final_val
            else if final_val > max_pos
              max_pos = final_val
            end
          end
          in_num = false
          sign = 1
          value = 0
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if has_pos
      print("max=#{max_pos}")
    else
      print("none")
    end
  end
end
